description: Behavioral Change Detection: Detect material runtime behavior changes.

fixtures.notes: Modifying an elif/else error-routing branch causes a previously-handled error code to fall through unhandled.
Return type changes from Optional[str] to str, removing the None return path and breaking callers that guard against None.
Pure docstring and comment update with no logic change — no observable behavior is altered.
Internal variable renamed from 'tmp' to 'result' with no change to logic or observable behavior.
Refactors a list comprehension to an equivalent for-loop — output is identical so no behavioral change.
